domain: Nepenthes pitcher plant peristome aquaplaning (wet-state-triggered anisotropic ridge surface; dry = walkable; wet = one-way capture; trap invisible when dry; activation purely conditional on humidity/water-film predicate)
specific_mechanism: State-conditioned anisotropic one-way trap; inert until a wetness predicate is satisfied, at which point geometry-driven capture engages with no warning.
llm_application: PCAP (Peristome Conditional Aquaplaning Gate): state-conditioned LLM-agent input filter inert under benign 'dry' contexts (passthrough, zero overhead); upon a 'wetness predicate' (multiple soft adversarial-indicator features above calibrated threshold), it routes the request into an anisotropic sandboxed sub-prompt where harmful completions are silently absorbed without surfacing — the trap is latent under benign inputs.
novelty_claim: HSF (2409.03788), Alert (2601.03600), Jailbreaking-Leaves-a-Trace (2602.11495) detect or filter jailbreak inputs at every step. PCAP is uniquely conditionally-activated AND anisotropic (one-way routing) AND silent (request still answered inside quarantine) — combination not in prior art.
